Text: At its meeting on 15 November 2019, the Committee, having been informed by the complainant that the authorities of the State party have requested him to submit a new application for asylum, as most of the evidence submitted to the Committee has never been examined on the merits, and taking into account that the complainant notes that he no longer faces deportation and that he therefore requests that his complaint should be discontinued, found that communication No. 864/2018 had become moot and decided to discontinue its consideration thereof, bearing in mind that the complainant would be able to submit another communication if he faced a new risk of forced return to the Democratic Republic of the Congo.
